name: rosasalberto--didit-kyc-onboarding
description: End-to-end KYC (Know Your Customer) identity verification for onboarding real users. Use when someone needs to perform KYC, onboard users with identity verification, verify a person's identity with ID scan and selfie, run a full KYC flow, create a verification session for a user, set up ID + liveness + face match verification, or implement user onboarding with document and biometric checks. Creates a KYC workflow, generates a verification URL, and retrieves the decision.
